rationale: The cited paper appears only as part of a grouped methodological citation when the authors define a 5 km trading zone for local markets (similar to Singh et al. 2006; Vroegrijk et al. 2013). The citing paper does not build its theory, hypotheses, or core model on this specific study, nor does it discuss its findings when interpreting results. This indicates background precedent use rather than a distinct, paper-specific contribution to the citing paper's argument.
